pet.name: Mango
pet.breedColor: fawn pug with a black mask over his muzzle, deep velvety wrinkles, big dark round eyes, and a tightly curled tail

memories.favoriteActivity: waddling beside you on slow evening walks around the park
memories.sleepingSpot: snuggled into the cushions at the foot of your bed
memories.favoriteMemory: The evening you two sat together on the low wall by the park fence, your hand resting on his back, both of you watching the world go by until the light turned golden.
